raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX is stating that they received the funds on returned item on XXXX the XXXX and provided me with the proof of payment by XXXX to American Express. American Express is refusing to acknowledge that they received the funds on XX/XX/XXXX and more that XXXX business days have passed. 

American Express feels that it is a large company that does not have to obey consumer law and can change the rules which affect consumer rights and credit scores. 

Here is the evidence of the refund which was also submitted to American Express : Hello, This is the refund ID for the Amount {$530.00} - XXXX XXXX XXXX Thank you. 

Best regards, XXXX
